status.goal: Full song 2-3 min for streaming; 45-90s excerpt for vertical edit
status.targetDuration: 2-3 minutes (full, operator-tuned); excerpt for short video

fields.title: Butter Fold Midnight
fields.styleOfMusic: Warm French-touch K-pop pop with brushed acoustic guitar harmonics, soft trap hats, buttery synth bass, and airy stacked vocals; verses stay intimate and tactile, pre-chorus lifts with rising filtered pads, chorus blooms golden and flaky with gang-vocal hooks. ASMR ear candy: dry dough fold, oven hush, chocolate chip clatter, pecan crack, gooey stretch. Clean bakery-glow mix, morning terrazzo light, no harsh drops., pop, electronic, acoustic
fields.excludeStyles: No aggressive rap, no metal, no heavy rock, no children's choir, no advertising voice-over, no real artist imitation, no brand names, no recipe-tutorial lyrics, no ingredient counting, no Paris boulangerie name-drops, no TikTok trend callouts.
fields.autoLyricsPrompt:
Write original English song lyrics about a playful unicorn chef making homemade crookies: laminated croissant layers folded with cold butter, golden baked crescents, chocolate-chip cookie dough pressed inside and out, pecan crunch, and a second bake until the center melts. Use only lyrics and section tags; do not explain the prompt. Do not include genre, production, instrument, mix, or vocal-style instructions. Do not write a recipe tutorial, quantities, numbered steps, brand names, or social media references.

Mood: buttery, flaky, gooey, midnight-gold, pecan-brown, chocolate-gloss, cozy bakery ASMR, satisfied not saccharine.

Lyric style: short singable lines, clipped phrasing, catchy repetitions, call-and-response energy, simple hooks, occasional parenthetical echoes like "(fold it)" or "(golden horn)". Keep the chorus reusable for a 45-90 second video edit.

Story and imagery to weave in naturally:
- cold butter square locked in dough, fold after fold, visible layers
- raw crescent spiral, oven breath, golden flake that pulls apart
- melted butter and muscovado ribbon, chip storm, chilled dough balls
- hinge cut croissant, cookie disk inside and out, pecan rain
- steam on the tray, gooey heart stretch, cooling rack shine
- intact crookie on the Licorn island, satisfied glow, feuilleté still proud

Must include naturally: crookie, croissant layers, cookie heart, chocolate chips, pecan crack, butter fold, golden horn, unicorn, Licorn kitchen.

Structure:
[Verse 1]
Cold square, warm hands, layers whisper low.

[Pre-Chorus]
Spiral tip waits; oven gold begins.

[Chorus]
Chantable hook around butter fold, flaky crown, cookie heart, chew and pull.

[Verse 2]
Chip rain, pecan snap, second fire glow.

[Bridge]
Softer breath: break and stretch, then hero still on stone.

[Final Chorus]
Repeat chorus with richer harmony; crookie intact on the counter.
fields.shortVersionPlan: Open on Verse 1 lamination fold synced to segment-01, pre-chorus into baked crescent pull (segment-02) and cookie ball chill (segment-03), chorus over crookie fill and second bake (segments 04-05), tag the motionless intact crookie hero from segment-06 before the Licorn outro. Keep chorus hook under 15 seconds for TikTok/Reels.

instructions.voice: Warm close-mic lead with soft doubles on chorus; playful bakery intimacy, not explicit.
instructions.structure: Chorus must survive a 45-90s vertical cut over gooey reveal (segment-05) and hero lock (segment-06).
instructions.workflowNotes: Suno is manual. Paste fields into Suno Custom Mode.

autoLyricsPrompt: Opening line: change "Write original English song lyrics" to "Write original 2-3 minutes English song lyrics".
Lyric style line: after "Keep the chorus reusable for a 45-90 second video edit.", add ", but make a 2-3 minutes song".
Structure header: change "Structure:" to "Extend this structure to fit a 2-3 minutes song:"

qualityChecks: Title avoids protected brands and artists.
Style of Music has no 2-3 minutes suffix in agent baseline.
Auto Lyrics Prompt is English, uses baseline opener, and ends lyric style with the 45-90 second video edit clause.
Short version aligns with lamination hook, bake reveal, and hero lock beats.
No music requested in Seedance prompts.
Lyrics honor homemade croissant path per creator instruction (not store-bought shortcut).
